Z2-FM-01: compare two possible sorting rules explicitly
keep the task to one attribute at a time
Z2-FM-02: sort the same set twice under different named rules
ask what stays the same inside each group
Z2-FM-03: ask which item does not belong and why
compare correct and incorrect groups side by side
remove one mismatched item at a time
Z2-FM-04: move from concrete objects to picture cards with the same rule language
use parallel sorting tasks across materials
restate the rule in each context
